description: Private, offline AI-assisted development powered by Apple's on-device Foundation Models. macOS only.
command.manage.title: Manage Provider
command.showStatus.title: Show Status
command.restartServer.title: Restart Bridge Server
command.showLogs.title: Show Logs
command.runOnboarding.title: Run Setup Check
participant.description: Private, offline, on-device help — explain, document, and write commits
participant.explain.description: Explain the selected code or a concept
participant.doc.description: Generate a documentation comment for the selection
participant.commit.description: Write a Conventional Commit message from staged changes
walkthrough.title: Get started with Apple Foundation Models
walkthrough.description: Chat with Apple's on-device model in VS Code — no API key, no cloud, works offline.
walkthrough.checkSetup.title: Check your setup
walkthrough.checkSetup.description:
Verify macOS, Apple Silicon, Apple Intelligence, and the bridge CLI are ready.
[Run Setup Check](command:appleFoundation.runOnboarding)
walkthrough.pickModel.title: Pick the on-device model
walkthrough.pickModel.description:
Open Chat and choose "Apple On-Device" from the model picker.
[Open Chat](command:workbench.action.chat.open)
walkthrough.tryApple.title: Try @apple
walkthrough.tryApple.description: Mention @apple in chat for /explain, /doc, and /commit — all private and offline.
config.executablePath.description: Path to the bridge CLI. Defaults to the `fm` CLI preinstalled on macOS 27+. On macOS 26, set this to `afm` (install via `brew install scouzi1966/afm/afm`). Machine-scoped: cannot be set by a workspace.
config.port.description: Local port for the bridge server. The server binds to 127.0.0.1 only. Machine-scoped: cannot be set by a workspace.
config.autoStart.description: Automatically start the bridge server when a chat request needs it.
config.idleTimeoutMinutes.description: Stop a bridge process this extension started after this many minutes idle. 0 disables idle shutdown. Never kills a user-started bridge.
config.maxOutputTokens.description: Maximum tokens the model may produce per response.
config.maxContextTokens.description: Shared context window (input + output) used for budgeting. Raise if your on-device model reports a larger window; lower on memory-constrained machines.
config.offlineOnlyMode.description: Refuse to use any model except the on-device `system` model, even if the bridge offers alternatives (such as Private Cloud Compute). An auditable guarantee for air-gapped environments.
